headline: How Carrier’s AI-Powered Heat Pump Bet In Europe (CARR) Has Changed Its Investment Story
summary: Earlier this week, Carrier Global’s venture arm, Carrier Ventures, invested in UK-based Heat Geek, a residential heat pump platform that uses AI tools to match European homeowners with certified local installers for efficient system design and installation. This move underscores Carrier’s push into electrified residential heating in Europe, deepening its presence in high-efficiency, digitally enabled heat pump solutions. Next, we’ll examine how Carrier’s backing of Heat Geek’s AI-enabled...
